title: hydrangea fauriei
intro: Hydrangea fauriei, also known as the Mountain Hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the Hydrangeaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in East Asia, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids. The medicinal properties of Hydrangea fauriei have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with arthritis, fever, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
